name: kweb-gds-viewer
description: GDS/OAS layout viewer powered by kweb (Python uvicorn ASGI app) embedded in a VS Code custom editor webview.

kweb-gds-viewer.kwebPythonPath.description: Optional path to a Python executable for the GDS kweb viewer (must satisfy kweb+uvicorn probes). When empty, discovery tries $HOME/miniforge3 and $HOME/mambaforge before the Python extension / defaultInterpreterPath. Override when kweb lives elsewhere.

kweb-gds-viewer.layerPropertiesFile.description: Path to a KLayout layer properties file (.lyp) to apply when viewing GDS/OAS files. Accepts an absolute path or a path relative to the workspace root. When empty, the viewer auto-detects a .lyp file in the same directory as the opened GDS file, then falls back to the workspace root.

kweb-gds-viewer.kwebPort.description: TCP port for the kweb GDS server. Change this when running a debug Extension Host alongside the installed extension to avoid port conflicts (e.g. set to 8077 in the workspace .vscode/settings.json of the extension project).
